name: HWR_WLNS_TASKS_VL
query: SELECT B.TASK_ID, T.TITLE, B.START_DATE, B.END_DATE, B.AWARD_TYPE, B.AWARD, T.DESCRIPTION, B.STATUS, B.IS_ACTIVE, B.IS_IMAGE, B.ORDER_RANK, B.ARCHIVE_DATE, B.IMAGE, B.PUBLISH_START_DATE, B.PUBLISH_END_DATE, B.TASK_ATTR_1, B.TASK_ATTR_2, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_WLNS_TASKS_B B, HWR_WLNS_TASKS_TL T WHERE B.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
